creator: knezour@weboutsourcing.cz
text:
At the end of the page (see PR URL) in Example 7.4. Flavor Specific PKGNAME there is sentence 

As all packages must have a different package name, flavors must change theirs, using flavor_PKGNAMESUFFIX and flavor_PKGNAMESUFFIX makes this easy

That sentence contains flavor_PKGNAMESUFFIX twice and flavor_PKGNAMEPREFIX is missing.
